segments.text: Yahweh’s word came to me, saying,

Go and proclaim in the ears of Jerusalem, saying, ‘Yahweh says,“I remember for you the kindness of your youth, your love as a bride, how you went after me in the wilderness, in a land that was not sown.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: Israel was holiness to Yahweh, the first fruits of his increase. All who devour him will be held guilty. Evil will come on them,
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: ’ says Yahweh.”
Hear Yahweh’s word, O house of Jacob, and all the families of the house of Israel!
Yahweh says,
What unrighteousness have your fathers found in me, that they have gone far from me, and have walked after worthless vanity, and have become worthless?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
They didn’t say, ‘Where is Yahweh who brought us up out of the land of Egypt, who led us through the wilderness, 
through a land of deserts and of pits, 
through a land of drought and of the shadow of death, 
through a land that no one passed through, 
and where no man lived?’
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: I brought you into a plentiful landto eat its fruit and its goodness; but when you entered, you defiled my land, and made my heritage an abomination.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
The priests didn’t say, ‘Where is Yahweh?’and those who handle the law didn’t know me. The rulers also transgressed against me, and the prophets prophesied by Baal
and followed things that do not profit.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Therefore I will yet contend with you,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh,
and I will contend with your children’s children.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
For pass over to the islands of Kittim, and see. Send to Kedar, and consider diligently, 
and see if there has been such a thing.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Has a nation changed its gods, which really are no gods?
But my people have changed their glory for that which doesn’t profit.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
“Be astonished, you heavens, at this and be horribly afraid. 
Be very desolate,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.

For my people have committed two evils: they have forsaken me, the spring of living waters, 
and cut out cisterns for themselves: broken cisterns that can’t hold water.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Is Israel a slave? Is he born into slavery?
Why has he become a captive?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
The young lions have roared at him and raised their voices. They have made his land waste. 
His cities are burned up, without inhabitant.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: The children also of Memphis and Tahpanhes have broken the crown of your head.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Haven’t you brought this on yourself, in that you have forsaken Yahweh your God,  when he led you by the way?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Now what do you gain by going to Egypt, to drink the waters of the Shihor? Or why do you go on the way to Assyria, to drink the waters of the River?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
“Your own wickedness will correct you, and your backsliding will rebuke you. Know therefore and see that it is an evil and bitter thing, that you have forsaken Yahweh your God, 
and that my fear is not in you,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the Lord, Yahweh of Armies.

For long ago I broke off your yoke, and burst your bonds. You said, ‘I will not serve;’for on every high hill and under every green tree you bowed yourself, 
playing the prostitute.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
Yet I had planted you a noble vine, a pure and faithful seed. 
How then have you turned into the degenerate branches of a foreign vine to me?
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
For though you wash yourself with lye, and use much soap, 
yet your iniquity is marked before me,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: says the Lord Yahweh.
How can you say, ‘I am not defiled. I have not gone after the Baals’? See your way in the valley. Know what you have done. You are a swift dromedary traversing her ways,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
a wild donkey used to the wilderness, that sniffs the wind in her craving. When she is in heat, who can turn her away?
All those who seek her will not weary themselves. In her month, they will find her.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
“Keep your feet from being bare, and your throat from thirst. But you said, ‘It is in vain. No, for I have loved strangers, 
and I will go after them.’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
As the thief is ashamed when he is found, so the house of Israel is ashamed—
they, their kings, their princes, their priests, and their prophets,
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
who tell wood, ‘You are my father,’and a stone, ‘You have given birth to me,’for they have turned their back to me, and not their face, 
but in the time of their trouble they will say, ‘Arise, and save us!’
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text:
“But where are your gods that you have made for yourselves? Let them arise, if they can save you in the time of your trouble, 
for you have as many gods as you have towns, O Judah.
segments.speaker: the Lord

segments.text: “Why will you contend with me? You all have transgressed against me,
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: says Yahweh.
I have struck your children in vain. They received no correction. Your own sword has devoured your prophets, like a destroying lion.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Generation, consider Yahweh’s word. Have I been a wilderness to Israel?
Or a land of thick darkness? Why do my people say, ‘We have broken loose. We will come to you no more’?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
“Can a virgin forget her ornaments, or a bride her attire?
Yet my people have forgotten me for days without number.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: How well you prepare your way to seek love! Therefore you have even taught the wicked women your ways.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Also the blood of the souls of the innocent poor is found in your skirts. You didn’t find them breaking in, 
but it is because of all these things.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: “Yet you said, ‘I am innocent. Surely his anger has turned away from me.’“Behold, I will judge you, because you say, ‘I have not sinned.’
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Why do you go about so much to change your ways? You will be ashamed of Egypt also, 
as you were ashamed of Assyria.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
You will also leave that place with your hands on your head; for Yahweh has rejected those in whom you trust, 
and you won’t prosper with them. 

### Footnotes
: + The Hebrew word rendered “God
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: is
אֱלֹהִ֑ים
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
(Elohim).
: + i. e., the Euphrates River
